title: monitor_client.lua
content:
local MODEM_SIDE = "bottom"
local MONITOR_SIDE = "left"
local MASTER_PROTOCOL = "rtm_master_state"
local REQUEST_PROTOCOL = "rtm_master_query"
local CLIENT_NAME = "dispatcher_monitor"
local native = term.current()

local monitor = nil
local masterId = nil
local blink = false
local lastState = nil
local lastSeen = 0

local DEFAULT_MARKERS = {
  green = { 26, 4 },
  blue = { 42, 4 },
  red = { 26, 19 },
  purple = { 42, 19 },
}

local SEGMENTS = {
  top_left_outer   = { points = { {4,6}, {9,6}, {14,6}, {19,6} } },
  top_left_inner   = { points = { {21,6}, {25,6}, {29,6}, {33,6} } },
  top_right_inner  = { points = { {39,6}, {43,6}, {47,6}, {51,6} } },
  top_right_outer  = { points = { {53,6}, {58,6}, {63,6}, {68,6} } },
  bot_left_outer   = { points = { {4,17}, {9,17}, {14,17}, {19,17} } },
  bot_left_inner   = { points = { {21,17}, {25,17}, {29,17}, {33,17} } },
  bot_right_inner  = { points = { {39,17}, {43,17}, {47,17}, {51,17} } },
  bot_right_outer  = { points = { {53,17}, {58,17}, {63,17}, {68,17} } },
  green_diag       = { points = { {19,6}, {23,8}, {27,10}, {31,12}, {35,13} } },
  red_diag         = { points = { {21,16}, {25,14}, {29,12}, {33,10}, {36,9} } },
  blue_diag        = { points = { {39,10}, {43,9}, {47,7}, {51,6} } },
  purple_diag      = { points = { {39,12}, {43,14}, {47,16}, {51,18} } },
}

local function openNet()
  if peripheral.getType(MODEM_SIDE) ~= "modem" then error("Nincs modem a bottom oldalon") end
  if not rednet.isOpen(MODEM_SIDE) then rednet.open(MODEM_SIDE) end
end

local function initMonitor()
  if peripheral.getType(MONITOR_SIDE) ~= "monitor" then error("Nincs monitor a left oldalon") end
  monitor = peripheral.wrap(MONITOR_SIDE)
  monitor.setTextScale(0.5)
end

local function drawLineTerm(target, x1, y1, x2, y2, color)
  term.redirect(target)
  paintutils.drawLine(x1, y1, x2, y2, color)
end

local function drawPolyline(target, points, color)
  for i = 1, #points - 1 do
    drawLineTerm(target, points[i][1], points[i][2], points[i + 1][1], points[i + 1][2], color)
  end
end

local function routeByKey(key)
  if not lastState or not lastState.routes then return nil end
  for _, route in ipairs(lastState.routes) do
    if route.key == key then return route end
  end
  return nil
end

local function hasAlert(route)
  if not route then return true end
  return route.missing or route.offline
end

local function routeColor(route)
  if hasAlert(route) and blink then return colors.red end
  return route and route.color or colors.gray
end

local function drawSegment(name, color)
  local seg = SEGMENTS[name]
  if seg then drawPolyline(monitor, seg.points, color) end
end

local function drawMap()
  local green = routeByKey("green")
  local blue = routeByKey("blue")
  local red = routeByKey("red")
  local purple = routeByKey("purple")

  monitor.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
  monitor.clear()

  drawSegment("top_left_outer", colors.gray)
  drawSegment("top_right_outer", colors.gray)
  drawSegment("bot_left_outer", colors.gray)
  drawSegment("bot_right_outer", colors.gray)

  drawSegment("top_left_inner", (green and not green.active) and routeColor(green) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("top_right_inner", (blue and not blue.active) and routeColor(blue) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("bot_left_inner", (red and not red.active) and routeColor(red) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("bot_right_inner", (purple and not purple.active) and routeColor(purple) or colors.gray)

  drawSegment("green_diag", (green and green.active) and routeColor(green) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("blue_diag", (blue and blue.active) and routeColor(blue) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("red_diag", (red and red.active) and routeColor(red) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("purple_diag", (purple and purple.active) and routeColor(purple) or colors.gray)
end

local function drawMarkers()
  if not lastState or not lastState.routes then return end
  for i, route in ipairs(lastState.routes) do
    local marker = route.marker or DEFAULT_MARKERS[route.key]
    if marker then
      monitor.setCursorPos(marker[1], marker[2])
      monitor.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
      if hasAlert(route) and blink then
        monitor.setTextColor(colors.red)
      elseif lastState.selected == i then
        monitor.setTextColor(colors.white)
      else
        monitor.setTextColor(route.color)
      end
      monitor.write(route.active and "[*]" or "[ ]")
    end
  end
end

local function drawLegend()
  if not lastState or not lastState.routes then return end
  local _, h = monitor.getSize()
  local startY = math.max(1, h - #lastState.routes - 1)
  for i, route in ipairs(lastState.routes) do
    monitor.setCursorPos(2, startY + i - 1)
    monitor.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
    if hasAlert(route) and blink then
      monitor.setTextColor(colors.red)
    elseif lastState.selected == i then
      monitor.setTextColor(colors.white)
    else
      monitor.setTextColor(route.color)
    end
    local stateText = route.active and "KERESZT" or "EGYENES"
    local line = (route.active and "[*] " or "[ ] ") .. route.name .. " ID:" .. tostring(route.slaveId or "-") .. " " .. stateText
    if route.missing then
      line = line .. " NINCS ID"
    elseif route.offline then
      line = line .. " OFFLINE"
    end
    monitor.write(line)
  end
end

local function drawStatus()
  monitor.setCursorPos(2, 22)
  monitor.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
  monitor.setTextColor(colors.white)
  if masterId then
    monitor.write("MASTER ID: " .. masterId .. "  LAST: " .. math.floor(os.clock() - lastSeen) .. "s")
  else
    monitor.write("MASTER KERESES...")
  end
end

local function redraw()
  term.redirect(monitor)
  drawMap()
  drawMarkers()
  drawLegend()
  drawStatus()
  term.redirect(native)
end

local function findMaster()
  local found = rednet.lookup(MASTER_PROTOCOL, "rtm_master", 2)
  if found then masterId = found end
end

local function requestState()
  if not masterId then
    findMaster()
    return
  end
  rednet.send(masterId, { cmd = "get_panel_state", client = os.getComputerID() }, REQUEST_PROTOCOL)
  local senderId, msg, protocol = rednet.receive(REQUEST_PROTOCOL, 0.8)
  if senderId == masterId and protocol == REQUEST_PROTOCOL and type(msg) == "table" and msg.routes then
    lastState = msg
    lastSeen = os.clock()
  else
    masterId = nil
  end
end

openNet()
initMonitor()
redraw()

while true do
  requestState()
  blink = not blink
  redraw()
  sleep(1)
end

title: slave_setup.lua
content:
local CONFIG_FILE = "slave.cfg"
local MODEM_SIDE = "bottom"

local config = {
  routes = {
    green = { activeSides = {}, inactiveSides = {} },
    blue = { activeSides = {}, inactiveSides = {} },
    red = { activeSides = {}, inactiveSides = {} },
    purple = { activeSides = {}, inactiveSides = {} },
  }
}

local routeKeys = { "green", "blue", "red", "purple" }
local routeNames = {
  green = "Zold",
  blue = "Kek",
  red = "Piros",
  purple = "Lila",
}

local function loadConfig()
  if not fs.exists(CONFIG_FILE) then return end
  local h = fs.open(CONFIG_FILE, "r")
  local raw = h.readAll()
  h.close()
  local t = textutils.unserialize(raw)
  if type(t) == "table" then config = t end
end

local function saveConfig()
  local h = fs.open(CONFIG_FILE, "w")
  h.write(textutils.serialize(config))
  h.close()
end

local function splitSides(text)
  local out = {}
  for part in string.gmatch((text or ""), "[^,%s]+") do
    if part ~= MODEM_SIDE then table.insert(out, part) end
  end
  return out
end

local function listSides(t)
  if not t or #t == 0 then return "(nincs)" end
  return table.concat(t, ",")
end

local function clearAll()
  for _, side in ipairs({ "top", "left", "right", "front", "back" }) do
    redstone.setOutput(side, false)
  end
end

local function pulse(list)
  clearAll()
  for _, side in ipairs(list or {}) do
    redstone.setOutput(side, true)
  end
  sleep(1)
  clearAll()
end

loadConfig()

while true do
  term.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
  term.setTextColor(colors.white)
  term.clear()
  term.setCursorPos(1,1)
  print("ROUTE SLAVE SETUP")
  print("=================")
  print("Computer ID: " .. os.getComputerID())
  print("Modem oldal: " .. MODEM_SIDE)
  print("Alaphelyzet: egyenes / nincs redstone")
  print("")
  for _, key in ipairs(routeKeys) do
    local r = config.routes[key]
    print(routeNames[key] .. " aktiv:   " .. listSides(r.activeSides))
    print(routeNames[key] .. " egyenes: " .. listSides(r.inactiveSides))
  end
  print("")
  print("1 - Route szerkesztese")
  print("2 - Aktiv route teszt")
  print("3 - Egyenes teszt")
  print("4 - Mentes")
  print("5 - Kilepes")
  print("")
  write("> ")
  local cmd = read()

  if cmd == "1" then
    write("Route key (green/blue/red/purple): ")
    local key = read()
    if config.routes[key] then
      write("Aktiv oldalak (pl top,left): ")
      config.routes[key].activeSides = splitSides(read())
      write("Egyenes oldalak (uresen hagyhatod): ")
      config.routes[key].inactiveSides = splitSides(read())
    end
  elseif cmd == "2" then
    write("Route key (green/blue/red/purple): ")
    local key = read()
    if config.routes[key] then
      print("1 mp aktiv teszt")
      pulse(config.routes[key].activeSides)
    end
  elseif cmd == "3" then
    print("1 mp egyenes teszt")
    clearAll()
    sleep(1)
  elseif cmd == "4" then
    saveConfig()
    print("Mentve")
    sleep(1)
  elseif cmd == "5" then
    clearAll()
    term.clear()
    term.setCursorPos(1,1)
    print("Kilepes")
    break
  end
end

title: slave_switch.lua
content:
local MODEM_SIDE = "bottom"
local PROTOCOL = "rtm_top_switch"
local native = term.current()

local function draw(on)
  term.redirect(native)
  term.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
  term.clear()
  term.setCursorPos(1,1)
  term.setTextColor(colors.yellow)
  print("SLAVE SWITCH")
  term.setTextColor(colors.white)
  print("ID: " .. os.getComputerID())
  print("Modem: " .. MODEM_SIDE)
  print("Redstone: top")
  print("")
  term.setTextColor(on and colors.lime or colors.gray)
  print("TOP JEL: " .. (on and "AKTIV" or "NINCS"))
  term.setTextColor(colors.lightGray)
  print("")
  print("Varakozas master parancsra...")
end

local function setTop(enabled)
  redstone.setOutput("top", enabled)
  draw(enabled)
end

rednet.open(MODEM_SIDE)
setTop(false)

while true do
  local senderId, msg, protocol = rednet.receive(PROTOCOL)
  if type(msg) == "table" then
    if msg.cmd == "set_top" then
      local enabled = msg.enabled and true or false
      setTop(enabled)
      rednet.send(senderId, {
        ok = true,
        id = os.getComputerID(),
        enabled = enabled,
      }, PROTOCOL)
    elseif msg.cmd == "ping" then
      rednet.send(senderId, {
        ok = true,
        id = os.getComputerID(),
        enabled = redstone.getOutput("top"),
      }, PROTOCOL)
    elseif msg.cmd == "get_state" then
      rednet.send(senderId, {
        ok = true,
        id = os.getComputerID(),
        enabled = redstone.getOutput("top"),
      }, PROTOCOL)
    end
  end
end

title: master_manager.lua
content:
local MODEM_SIDE = "bottom"
local MONITOR_SIDE = "left"
local DB_FILE = "panel.db"
local PROTOCOL = "rtm_top_switch"
local MASTER_PROTOCOL = "rtm_master_state"
local REQUEST_PROTOCOL = "rtm_master_query"
local MASTER_HOSTNAME = "rtm_master"
local native = term.current()

local running = true
local monitor = nil
local blinkState = false
local status = "Indulas"

local DEFAULT_MARKERS = {
  green = { 26, 4 },
  blue = { 42, 4 },
  red = { 26, 19 },
  purple = { 42, 19 },
}

local panel = {
  version = 10,
  selected = 1,
  routes = {
    { key = "green",  name = "Zold ag",  color = colors.lime,      slaveId = nil, active = false, offline = true, missing = true, marker = { 26, 4 } },
    { key = "blue",   name = "Kek ag",   color = colors.lightBlue, slaveId = nil, active = false, offline = true, missing = true, marker = { 42, 4 } },
    { key = "red",    name = "Piros ag", color = colors.red,       slaveId = nil, active = false, offline = true, missing = true, marker = { 26, 19 } },
    { key = "purple", name = "Lila ag",  color = colors.purple,    slaveId = nil, active = false, offline = true, missing = true, marker = { 42, 19 } },
  }
}

local SEGMENTS = {
  top_left_outer   = { points = { {4,6}, {9,6}, {14,6}, {19,6} } },
  top_left_inner   = { points = { {21,6}, {25,6}, {29,6}, {33,6} } },
  top_right_inner  = { points = { {39,6}, {43,6}, {47,6}, {51,6} } },
  top_right_outer  = { points = { {53,6}, {58,6}, {63,6}, {68,6} } },
  bot_left_outer   = { points = { {4,17}, {9,17}, {14,17}, {19,17} } },
  bot_left_inner   = { points = { {21,17}, {25,17}, {29,17}, {33,17} } },
  bot_right_inner  = { points = { {39,17}, {43,17}, {47,17}, {51,17} } },
  bot_right_outer  = { points = { {53,17}, {58,17}, {63,17}, {68,17} } },
  green_diag       = { points = { {19,6}, {23,8}, {27,10}, {31,12}, {35,13} } },
  red_diag         = { points = { {21,16}, {25,14}, {29,12}, {33,10}, {36,9} } },
  blue_diag        = { points = { {39,10}, {43,9}, {47,7}, {51,6} } },
  purple_diag      = { points = { {39,12}, {43,14}, {47,16}, {51,18} } },
}

local function setStatus(msg)
  status = msg
end

local function getRoute(key)
  for _, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    if route.key == key then return route end
  end
  return nil
end

local function ensureRouteFlags()
  for _, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    if route.active == nil then route.active = false end
    route.missing = route.slaveId == nil
    if route.offline == nil then route.offline = true end
    if route.marker == nil and DEFAULT_MARKERS[route.key] then
      route.marker = { DEFAULT_MARKERS[route.key][1], DEFAULT_MARKERS[route.key][2] }
    end
  end
end

local function saveDb()
  local h = fs.open(DB_FILE, "w")
  h.write(textutils.serialize(panel))
  h.close()
  setStatus("Mentve: " .. DB_FILE)
end

local function loadDb()
  if not fs.exists(DB_FILE) then
    ensureRouteFlags()
    setStatus("Uj panel adatbazis")
    return
  end
  local h = fs.open(DB_FILE, "r")
  local raw = h.readAll()
  h.close()
  local t = textutils.unserialize(raw)
  if type(t) == "table" then
    panel = t
    if not panel.selected then panel.selected = 1 end
    ensureRouteFlags()
    setStatus("Betoltve: " .. DB_FILE)
  else
    ensureRouteFlags()
    setStatus("Hibas adatbazis")
  end
end

local function openNet()
  if peripheral.getType(MODEM_SIDE) ~= "modem" then
    setStatus("Nincs modem a bottom oldalon")
    return false
  end
  if not rednet.isOpen(MODEM_SIDE) then rednet.open(MODEM_SIDE) end
  rednet.host(MASTER_PROTOCOL, MASTER_HOSTNAME)
  return true
end

local function buildPanelState()
  local routes = {}
  for i, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    routes[i] = {
      key = route.key,
      name = route.name,
      color = route.color,
      slaveId = route.slaveId,
      active = route.active,
      offline = route.offline,
      missing = route.missing,
      marker = route.marker,
    }
  end
  return {
    selected = panel.selected,
    status = status,
    routes = routes,
  }
end

local function findRouteBySlave(id)
  for _, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    if route.slaveId == id then return route end
  end
  return nil
end

local function hasAlert(route)
  return route.missing or route.offline
end

local function drawLineTerm(target, x1, y1, x2, y2, color)
  term.redirect(target)
  paintutils.drawLine(x1, y1, x2, y2, color)
end

local function drawPolyline(target, points, color)
  if not points or #points < 2 then return end
  for i = 1, #points - 1 do
    drawLineTerm(target, points[i][1], points[i][2], points[i + 1][1], points[i + 1][2], color)
  end
end

local function drawSegment(name, color)
  local seg = SEGMENTS[name]
  if seg then drawPolyline(monitor, seg.points, color) end
end

local function routeDisplayColor(route)
  if hasAlert(route) and blinkState then return colors.red end
  return route.color
end

local function drawDispatcherMap()
  if not monitor then return end
  term.redirect(monitor)
  monitor.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
  monitor.clear()

  local green = getRoute("green")
  local blue = getRoute("blue")
  local red = getRoute("red")
  local purple = getRoute("purple")

  drawSegment("top_left_outer", colors.gray)
  drawSegment("top_right_outer", colors.gray)
  drawSegment("bot_left_outer", colors.gray)
  drawSegment("bot_right_outer", colors.gray)

  drawSegment("top_left_inner", (green and not green.active) and routeDisplayColor(green) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("top_right_inner", (blue and not blue.active) and routeDisplayColor(blue) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("bot_left_inner", (red and not red.active) and routeDisplayColor(red) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("bot_right_inner", (purple and not purple.active) and routeDisplayColor(purple) or colors.gray)

  drawSegment("green_diag", (green and green.active) and routeDisplayColor(green) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("blue_diag", (blue and blue.active) and routeDisplayColor(blue) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("red_diag", (red and red.active) and routeDisplayColor(red) or colors.gray)
  drawSegment("purple_diag", (purple and purple.active) and routeDisplayColor(purple) or colors.gray)
end

local function drawRouteMarkers()
  if not monitor then return end
  for index, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    local mx, my = route.marker[1], route.marker[2]
    monitor.setCursorPos(mx, my)
    monitor.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
    if hasAlert(route) and blinkState then
      monitor.setTextColor(colors.red)
    elseif index == panel.selected then
      monitor.setTextColor(colors.white)
    else
      monitor.setTextColor(route.color)
    end
    monitor.write(route.active and "[*]" or "[ ]")
  end
end

local function drawLegend()
  if not monitor then return end
  local _, h = monitor.getSize()
  local startY = math.max(1, h - #panel.routes - 1)
  for i, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    monitor.setCursorPos(2, startY + i - 1)
    monitor.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
    if hasAlert(route) and blinkState then
      monitor.setTextColor(colors.red)
    elseif i == panel.selected then
      monitor.setTextColor(colors.white)
    else
      monitor.setTextColor(route.color)
    end
    local stateText = route.active and "KERESZT" or "EGYENES"
    local line = (route.active and "[*] " or "[ ] ") .. route.name .. " ID:" .. tostring(route.slaveId or "-") .. " " .. stateText
    if route.missing then
      line = line .. " NINCS ID"
    elseif route.offline then
      line = line .. " OFFLINE"
    end
    monitor.write(line)
  end
end

local function redrawMonitor()
  if not monitor then return end
  drawDispatcherMap()
  drawRouteMarkers()
  drawLegend()
  term.redirect(native)
end

local function sendTopState(route, enabled)
  if not route.slaveId then
    route.missing = true
    route.offline = true
    setStatus("Nincs slave ID beallitva")
    return false
  end
  route.missing = false
  if not openNet() then return false end
  rednet.send(route.slaveId, { cmd = "set_top", enabled = enabled }, PROTOCOL)
  local senderId, msg = rednet.receive(PROTOCOL, 2)
  if senderId == route.slaveId and type(msg) == "table" and msg.ok then
    route.active = msg.enabled and true or false
    route.offline = false
    setStatus(route.name .. " -> " .. (route.active and "KERESZT" or "EGYENES"))
    return true
  end
  route.offline = true
  setStatus("Nincs valasz slave #" .. tostring(route.slaveId))
  return false
end

local function setAllStraight()
  if not openNet() then return end
  for _, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    route.active = false
    route.missing = route.slaveId == nil
    if route.slaveId then
      rednet.send(route.slaveId, { cmd = "set_top", enabled = false }, PROTOCOL)
    end
  end
  setStatus("Alaphelyzet: minden egyenes")
end

local function queryStartupStates()
  if not openNet() then return end
  for _, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    route.active = false
    route.missing = route.slaveId == nil
    if route.slaveId then
      route.offline = true
      rednet.send(route.slaveId, { cmd = "get_state" }, PROTOCOL)
    else
      route.offline = true
    end
  end
  local timer = os.startTimer(2)
  while true do
    local event, a, b, c = os.pullEvent()
    if event == "rednet_message" then
      local senderId, msg, protocol = a, b, c
      if protocol == PROTOCOL and type(msg) == "table" and msg.ok then
        local route = findRouteBySlave(senderId)
        if route then
          route.missing = false
          route.offline = false
          route.active = msg.enabled and true or false
        end
      end
    elseif event == "timer" and a == timer then
      setStatus("Indulasi allapotok lekerdezve")
      return
    end
  end
end

local function pingAll()
  if not openNet() then return end
  for _, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    route.missing = route.slaveId == nil
    if route.slaveId then
      route.offline = true
      rednet.send(route.slaveId, { cmd = "ping" }, PROTOCOL)
    else
      route.offline = true
    end
  end
  local timer = os.startTimer(1.5)
  while true do
    local event, a, b, c = os.pullEvent()
    if event == "rednet_message" then
      local senderId, msg, protocol = a, b, c
      if protocol == PROTOCOL and type(msg) == "table" and msg.ok then
        local route = findRouteBySlave(senderId)
        if route then
          route.missing = false
          route.offline = false
          if msg.enabled ~= nil then route.active = msg.enabled and true or false end
        end
      end
    elseif event == "timer" and a == timer then
      setStatus("Ping kesz")
      return
    end
  end
end

local function routeFromTouch(x, y)
  for i, route in ipairs(panel.routes) do
    local mx, my = route.marker[1], route.marker[2]
    if x >= mx and x <= mx + 2 and y == my then
      return i, route
    end
  end
  return nil, nil
end

local function touchLoop()
  while running and monitor do
    local event, side, x, y = os.pullEvent()
    if event == "monitor_touch" and side == MONITOR_SIDE then
      local index, route = routeFromTouch(x, y)
      if route then
        panel.selected = index
        sendTopState(route, not route.active)
        redrawMonitor()
      end
    elseif event == "monitor_resize" then
      redrawMonitor()
    end
  end
end

local function receiverLoop()
  while running do
    local senderId, msg, protocol = rednet.receive()

    if protocol == REQUEST_PROTOCOL and type(msg) == "table" and msg.cmd == "get_panel_state" then
      rednet.send(senderId, buildPanelState(), REQUEST_PROTOCOL)

    elseif protocol == PROTOCOL and type(msg) == "table" and msg.ok then
      local route = findRouteBySlave(senderId)
      if route then
        route.missing = false
        route.offline = false
        if msg.enabled ~= nil then route.active = msg.enabled and true or false end
        redrawMonitor()
      end
    end
  end
end

local function blinkLoop()
  while running do
    blinkState = not blinkState
    redrawMonitor()
    sleep(0.5)
  end
end

local function prompt(text, default)
  write(text)
  return read(nil, nil, nil, default)
end

local function editRoute(index)
  local route = panel.routes[index]
  term.clear()
  term.setCursorPos(1, 1)
  print("Ag szerkesztese: " .. route.name)
  route.name = prompt("Nev [" .. route.name .. "]: ", route.name)
  local sid = prompt("Slave ID [" .. tostring(route.slaveId or "") .. "]: ", route.slaveId and tostring(route.slaveId) or "")
  route.slaveId = tonumber(sid)
  route.missing = route.slaveId == nil
  route.offline = true
  setStatus("Ag frissitve")
end

local function uiLoop()
  while running do
    term.redirect(native)
    term.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
    term.setTextColor(colors.white)
    term.clear()
    term.setCursorPos(1, 1)
    local route = panel.routes[panel.selected]
    print("RTM ROUTE PANEL MANAGER")
    print("=======================")
    print("Kijelolt ag: " .. panel.selected .. " / " .. route.name)
    print("Slave ID: " .. tostring(route.slaveId or "nincs"))
    print("Allapot: " .. (route.active and "KERESZT" or "EGYENES"))
    print("Missing: " .. tostring(route.missing))
    print("Offline: " .. tostring(route.offline))
    print("")
    print("1 - Elozo ag")
    print("2 - Kovetkezo ag")
    print("3 - Ag valtasa")
    print("4 - Slave ID hozzarendeles")
    print("5 - Osszes ping")
    print("6 - Alaphelyzet (minden egyenes)")
    print("7 - Allapotok lekerdezese")
    print("8 - Mentes")
    print("9 - Betoltes")
    print("0 - Kilepes")
    print("")
    print("Status: " .. status)
    write("> ")
    local cmd = read()
    if cmd == "1" then
      panel.selected = panel.selected - 1
      if panel.selected < 1 then panel.selected = #panel.routes end
    elseif cmd == "2" then
      panel.selected = panel.selected + 1
      if panel.selected > #panel.routes then panel.selected = 1 end
    elseif cmd == "3" then
      sendTopState(route, not route.active)
    elseif cmd == "4" then
      editRoute(panel.selected)
    elseif cmd == "5" then
      pingAll()
    elseif cmd == "6" then
      setAllStraight()
    elseif cmd == "7" then
      queryStartupStates()
    elseif cmd == "8" then
      saveDb()
    elseif cmd == "9" then
      loadDb()
      queryStartupStates()
    elseif cmd == "0" then
      running = false
      break
    end
    redrawMonitor()
  end
end

loadDb()
openNet()

if peripheral.getType(MONITOR_SIDE) == "monitor" then
  monitor = peripheral.wrap(MONITOR_SIDE)
  monitor.setTextScale(0.5)
end

queryStartupStates()
redrawMonitor()

if monitor then
  parallel.waitForAny(uiLoop, touchLoop, receiverLoop, blinkLoop)
else
  parallel.waitForAny(uiLoop, receiverLoop, blinkLoop)
end

term.redirect(native)
term.setBackgroundColor(colors.black)
term.setTextColor(colors.white)
term.clear()
term.setCursorPos(1, 1)
print("Leallva")

"https://cdn.wallpapersafari.com/12/65/CXFx5k.jpg"
"https://4kwallpapers.com/images/wallpapers/mysterious-tree-ai-3840x2160-14954.jpg"

"https://www.wallpaperbetter.com/wallpaper/804/716/5/skull-black-skulls-3d-many-1080P-wallpaper.jpg"
"https://images.wallpapersden.com/image/download/blue-night-hd-ai-beach_bmZqam6UmZqaraWkpJRoZWxnrWdlaW0.jpg"
)

echo "Downloading wallpapers to: $WALL_DIR"

for URL in "${URLS[@]}"; do
    FILE="$WALL_DIR/$(basename "$URL")"

    if [[ -f "$FILE" ]]; then
        echo "Skipping (already exists): $(basename "$URL")"
        continue
    fi

    echo "Downloading: $(basename "$URL")"
    wget -q --show-progress -O "$FILE" "$URL"
done

echo "Done."

title: starship2.toml
content:
format = """
[$username@$hostname] $directory
$character"""

[username]
show_always = true
format = "$user"

[hostname]
ssh_only = false
format = "$hostname"

[directory]
truncation_length = 3
truncate_to_repo = false
format = "[$path]($style)"

[character]
success_symbol = "→ "
error_symbol = "→ "
vicmd_symbol = "→ "
format = "$symbol"

title: starship.toml
content:
format = """
$directory\
$git_branch\
$git_status\
$fill\
$python\
$lua\
$golang\
$package\
$aws\
$docker_context\
$jobs\
$cmd_duration\
$line_break\
$character"""

add_newline = true
palette = 'nord'

[directory]
style = 'bold fg:dark_blue'
format = '[$path ]($style)'
truncation_length = 3
truncation_symbol = '…/'
truncate_to_repo = false

[directory.substitutions]
'Documents' = '󰈙'
'Downloads' = ' '
'Music' = ' '
'Pictures' = ' '

[git_branch]
style = 'fg:green'
symbol = ' '
format = '[on](white) [$symbol$branch ]($style)'

[git_status]
style = 'fg:green'
format = '([$all_status$ahead_behind]($style) )'

[fill]
symbol = ' '

[python]
style = 'teal'
symbol = ' '
format = '[${symbol}${pyenv_prefix}(${version} )(\($virtualenv\) )]($style)'
pyenv_version_name = true
pyenv_prefix = ''

[lua]
symbol = ' '

[nodejs]
style = 'blue'
symbol = ' '

[golang]
style = 'blue'
symbol = ' '

[haskell]
style = 'blue'
symbol = ' '

[rust]
style = 'orange'
symbol = ' '

[ruby]
style = 'blue'
symbol = ' '

[package]
symbol = '󰏗 '

[aws]
symbol = ' '
style = 'yellow'
format = '[$symbol($profile )(\[$duration\] )]($style)'

[docker_context]
symbol = ' '
style = 'fg:#06969A'
format = '[$symbol]($style) $path'
detect_files = ['docker-compose.yml', 'docker-compose.yaml', 'Dockerfile']
detect_extensions = ['Dockerfile']

[jobs]
symbol = ' '
style = 'red'
number_threshold = 1
format = '[$symbol]($style)'

[cmd_duration]
min_time = 500
style = 'fg:gray'
format = '[$duration]($style)'

[palettes.nord]
dark_blue = '#5E81AC'
blue = '#81A1C1'
teal = '#88C0D0'
red = '#BF616A'
orange = '#D08770'
green = '#A3BE8C'
yellow = '#EBCB8B'
purple = '#B48EAD'
gray = '#434C5E'
black = '#2E3440'
white='#D8DEE9'

[palettes.onedark]
dark_blue='#61afef'
blue='#56b6c2'
red='#e06c75'
green='#98c379'
purple='#c678dd'
cyan='#56b6c2'
orange='#be5046'
yellow='#e5c07b'
gray='#828997'
white ='#abb2bf'
black='#2c323c'

title: The Iron Fangs - Cybernetic Vampire Short Story
content:
The Iron Fangs
A Short Story of a Cybernetically Enhanced Vampire
Created by Bug9519 using Copilot in Microsoft Word.
Licensed: CC-BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

In the heart of a rain-soaked Melbourne night, where neon lights flickered off puddles on the footpath, Viktor stalked the empty alleyways. The city hummed with the symphony of data streams and distant trams, but Viktor was not your garden-variety vampire. His crimson eyes glimmered with a subtle, synthetic light, and beneath his trench coat, the faint whir of servos accompanied every move he made.

Once, centuries ago, Viktor had relied solely on his supernatural abilities: the speed, the strength, the hunger. But technology caught up, as it always does. The hunters grew clever. UV drones patrolled the rooftops, while thermal sensors tracked the cold-blooded through the city’s sprawl. It was only a matter of time before the predators became the prey.
After a close call in a backstreet near the servo, Viktor struck a deal with a rogue bioengineer—part scientist, part artist, all genius. The upgrades were painful, even for an immortal. Titanium bones reinforced his fragile ancient frame. Nano-fibres laced through his muscles, boosting his strength beyond even the oldest legends of his kind. Most impressively, his fangs could now retract into a set of sharpened alloy tips, strong enough to pierce even the latest composite body armour.

Tonight, Viktor’s target was not a hapless commuter or a night-shift worker. He hunted the hunters themselves—a shadowy syndicate who trafficked in rare blood. As he leapt over a chain-link fence and landed without a sound, Viktor activated his optical implants. The world turned blue and gold, highlighting heartbeats through brick and metal.

He found the syndicate’s den above a shuttered chemist, guarded by thugs with cybernetic arms and mean stares. They never saw him coming. With a blur of motion and the hiss of servo-motors, Viktor incapacitated them, his alloy fangs glinting as he fed. He left them alive—barely—knowing that fear was a more potent message than death.

As dawn approached, Viktor vanished into the urban maze, a legend for the new age: part monster, part machine, all survivor beneath the Australian night sky.
